title: • Today's Intention: I will listen to the advice of others today with a
content:
• Today's Intention: I will listen to the advice of others today with an open heart, but I will reserve the right to follow my own inner truth.
    • NIGHT
    • Night Reading: "It seems to me, Govinda, that there is nothing in the world which I know less about than about this—about myself."
    • Reflection: Who was a "teacher" for me today (a person, a book, an experience)? What did I learn, and what did I decide for myself?
    Day 6
    MORNING
    • Morning Reading: "One could see by his peaceful countenance, by his gestures, by the way his eyes looked, by the way his hands hung, that this man had attained the goal."
    • Today's Intention: I will aim to embody my values today, not just talk about them.
    NIGHT
    • Night Reading: "Gotama was sitting there in a yellow robe, with a shaved head, his arms folded, in a meditative posture... a still, not a seeking, not a wishing, not an imitating, not an effortful face, but a light, a still face, full of peace, full of light, not looking for anything."
context: From document: A 30-Day Journey with Siddhartha: Aligning the Path with Daily Life — chunk 12 (chunk 12/29)
